channel.title: About Me on Samridh Anand
channel.description: Recent content in About Me on Samridh Anand

item.title: Early Speed Breaker Detection
item.description: A crowdsourced IoT solution to reduce road accidents by providing advance warnings about speed breakers and potholes while creating a comprehensive database of road hazards

item.title: GenieTest: Functional Test Generation Tool using AI
item.description: An AI-powered functional test generation tool that helps Quality Engineering (QE) professionals fast-track the process of writing test automation scripts by overcoming the limitations of standard coding assistants.

item.title: Pay via Fingerprint
item.description: A biometric payment system for campus transactions using fingerprint authentication, developed as part of the Microprocessors and Computer Architecture course (UE21CS251B)

item.title: A Multi-Agent RAG Framework for Automated Source Code Vulnerability Detection and Repair
item.description: A novel AI-powered system leveraging multiple LLM agents and Retrieval Augmented Generation for comprehensive vulnerability detection and automated repair in source code

item.title: GOSniff
item.description: A network packet analyzer written in Go with real-time web-based visualization

item.title: Mock Stock Trading Application
item.description: A stock market simulation platform using historical data and virtual currency for risk-free trading practice

item.title: Online Portal for University Students
item.description: A comprehensive university portal system developed using software engineering best practices and collaborative development methodologies

item.title: Guide to Developing Secure APIs
item.description: Best practices and methodologies for developing secure and robust APIs.

item.title: Creating an HTTPS Connection with an SSL Certificate
item.description: An in-depth guide on implementing HTTPS connections with SSL certificates for Apache servers.

Software Engineer with 1+ years of experience working in Quality Engineering (QE), ensuring software meets release standards and reliability requirements. My work involves testing distributed systems at scale and building automation tools. Graduated with a B.E. in Computer Science with specialization in Computer Networks and Security from PES University (2025).

Professional Focus

Currently working on quality assurance and release engineering for distributed database systems at Couchbase, with responsibilities including:

item.title: Food Supply Chain
item.description: A blockchain-based solution for the food industry supply chain, enhancing transparency and traceability through decentralization

item.title: Technologies
item.description:
Category Technologies
DevOps AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Jenkins
Programming Languages Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, C
Frameworks & Libraries Django, Flask, React, Node.js & Express, PyTorch, npm
Security Kali Linux
Databases MySQL, MongoDB
Automation & AI Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Selenium, Bash
Others Raspberry Pi, Linux, HTML & CSS, jQuery, Markdown
